scores.correctness_notes: Response correctly explains CollectStatusEvent firing after every hook, collect_unit_status vs collect_app_status distinction, and event.add_status() usage. However, the priority order omits 'error' (gold standard: error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active) and doesn't mention that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error. The example also only demonstrates collect_unit_status, not both handlers as the gold standard shows.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — the MyCharmConfig class at the top is unused/illustrative and doesn't claim to be an ops API; all actual ops APIs referenced (CollectStatusEvent, collect_unit_status, collect_app_status, add_status, BlockedStatus, WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus) exist and are used correctly
